questions: Tell me about yourself.
How did you hear about this position?
What do you know about our company?
Why do you want this job?
Describe a time you worked in a team. What was your role?
How do you handle conflict with a coworker?
Tell me about a time you had to collaborate with someone whose personality was different from yours.
What makes a team successful in your opinion?
Tell me about a time you led a project.
How do you motivate your team members?
Describe a situation where you had to make a difficult decision as a leader.
How do you delegate tasks to others?
Describe a difficult problem you faced and how you solved it.
Tell me about a time you failed. How did you handle it?
How do you approach a task that you've never done before?
Describe a situation where you had to think outside the box to solve a problem.
What are your greatest professional strengths?
What do you consider to be your weaknesses?
Tell me about your most significant professional achievement.
Where do you see yourself in five years?
